observedInstructionSignals: When you ARE done, first provide a brief text summary of what was accomplished, then call task_complete. Both the summary message and the tool call are required.

IMPORTANT: Before calling task_complete, you MUST provide a brief text summary of what was accomplished in your message. The task is not complete until both the summary and the task_complete call are present.
Do not restate the summary in your message text — it is shown to the user directly.
